title: De-Stress and Decompress Protocol for Reactivity Behavior Modification
raw_text: Reactivity behavior modification 7-step protocol by certified trainer Brie Blakeman, Noble Woof Portland: 1. Trigger identification - pinpoint stress sources (noises, spaces, other dogs). 2. Controlled exposure - gradual reintroduction via desensitization. 3. Positive reinforcement - reward calm behaviors with treats/praise/toys. 4. Alternative training - replacement behaviors (focus work, sit commands) in controlled settings. 5. Confidence building - decompression time in relaxed environments. 6. Behavior generalization - practice across varied contexts. 7. Professional guidance for individualized plans.

metadata.notes: Certified trainer, established Portland training business, positive reinforcement focused
